nodes.name: Hourly Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every hour to fetch fresh market data

nodes.name: CoinGecko Prices
nodes.notes: Fetches current prices from CoinGecko API

nodes.name: Normalize Price Data
nodes.notes: Transforms CoinGecko JSON into database-ready rows

nodes.name: Extract Headlines
nodes.notes: Extracts headlines array for sentiment scoring

nodes.name: ML Sentiment API
nodes.notes: Scores headlines using the ML API sentiment endpoint

nodes.name: Merge News + Sentiment
nodes.notes: Combines news items with their sentiment scores

nodes.name: Insert Prices
nodes.notes: Inserts price data into asset_prices table

nodes.name: Insert News
nodes.notes: Inserts enriched news data into market_news table

nodes.name: Combine Results
nodes.notes: Combines both insert results for logging
